'''Tarhassan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was controlled by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Planet-stub}}
